problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Viral. Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
